Add Note to Subscriber.description: Adds a new note to an existing subscriber.

Add/Update Subscriber.description: Add a new subscriber or update an existing one.

Create Audience.description: Creates a new audience in your MailChimp account.

Create Custom Event.description: Creates a custom event for an existing subscriber.

Permanently Delete Member.description: Deletes all personally identifiable information related to a member.

Remove Subscriber from Tag.description: Removes a subscriber from a tag within an audience.

Unsubscribe or Delete Contact.description: Unsubscribe or delete a contact by email address.

Campaign Report.description: Get report details for a specific sent campaign.

Click Report.description: Get report details for specific link clicks.

Find a Subscriber.description: Searches for a subscriber on your MailChimp audience.

Find Customer.description: Finds a customer by email address.

Find or Create Subscriber.description: Searches for a subscriber on your MailChimp audience.
